name: Rotational Push-Up
shortDescription: A push-up variation involving a torso rotation to challenge the chest, shoulders, triceps, and core.
instructions: From a push-up position, lower down as normal. As you press up, rotate your torso and extend one arm toward the ceiling, forming a T with your arms. Return to push-up position and repeat to the other side.
steps: Begin in a standard push-up position.
Lower your chest toward the floor.
As you press up, rotate your torso and lift one arm toward the ceiling.
Return to start, repeat on the other side.
breathing: Exhale when pushing up and rotating, inhale when lowering.
